hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r ".command // empty"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "git\s+push\s+.*\b(main|master)\b|git\s+push\s+origin\s+(main|master)"; then echo "🚫 Direct push to main/master is blocked. Create a feature branch and open a PR instead." >&2; exit 1; fi; exit 0'
